tools.name: quizbase_random
tools.description:
Fetch N random trivia questions matching filters. Quality-first: by default excludes questions flagged for review (use quality='all' to include for audit/research).

USE WHEN: building a quiz, sampling content for warmup, generating practice sets. NOT WHEN: you need a specific question ID (use quizb

tools.name: quizbase_list
tools.description:
Cursor-paginated browse over the catalog. Quality-first: by default excludes questions flagged for review (use quality='all' for full pool).

USE WHEN: full catalog sync, delta sync (updated_since), exhaustive enumeration by filter. NOT WHEN: you only need N random samples (use quizbase_random) or a

tools.name: quizbase_question_by_id
tools.description: Fetch one question with FULL per-record attribution (source, author, license, modifications, lastModified, sourceId, url) and `quality: "high" | "needs_review"` (always present — deep-link semantic means full row). USE WHEN: deep link to a question, full provenance lookup for redistribution, cache r

tools.name: quizbase_stats
tools.description:
Public catalog counters with live breakdowns by language, source, category, difficulty, topic, tag.

USE WHEN: showing catalog overview, picking a category programmatically, building landing copy, deciding "do we have enough X-content for this quiz".

OUTPUT FIELDS:
- total: approved questions in 'e

tools.name: quizbase_topics
tools.description: Discover curated topics (2,184 entries with aliases). USE WHEN: planning a multi-round quiz, exploring "what is available about X", showing topic browser. Sorted by count DESC, slug ASC. Cursor-paginated. INPUTS: q (substring on label/alias), kind (tag|subcategory), cursor, limit (max 500).

tools.name: quizbase_topic_by_slug
tools.description: Fetch one curated topic with facets (byCategory, byDifficulty, byLanguage, coOccurringTags, coOccurringSubcategories) and 3 sample questions. USE WHEN: zooming into a topic, deciding multi-round quiz structure. Returns {topic: null, error: "not_found"} when slug is unknown.

tools.name: quizbase_tags
tools.description: Raw tag dump (10k+ entries) with display label and question count. USE WHEN: building a tag picker, searching "is X a tag", running analytics. Curated higher-level groupings → quizbase_topics. INPUTS: q (substring), cursor, limit (max 500).

tools.name: quizbase_subcategories
tools.description: Raw subcategory dump (LLM-organic kebab-case, middle taxonomy layer between category and tags) with display label and count. USE WHEN: navigating between top-level category and individual tags, exploring topic structure. Filter questions via quizbase_random?subcategory=<slug>. INPUTS: q, cursor, lim

tools.name: quizbase_categories
tools.description: List of 24 top-level categories with i18n labels. USE WHEN: building a category picker, validating ?category= input. Stable enum (rarely changes). For higher-resolution browsing → quizbase_subcategories or quizbase_topics.

tools.name: quizbase_languages
tools.description: Returns supported language whitelist (ISO 639-1) with question counts per language. USE WHEN: showing language picker, validating ?lang= input, deciding fallback. Day 1: en + pl.

tools.name: quizbase_regions
tools.description: Discover region codes used by the catalog. **Cultural affinity** — a question is tagged with a region if residents of that country, or members of that cultural/religious group, are statistically more likely to know the answer (NOT geography of the subject). USE WHEN: planning a quiz targeting users

tools.name: quizbase_report
tools.description: Submit a content correction, copyright concern, or factual error report. USE WHEN: user (via your interface) flags a wrong answer, broken translation, attribution issue, or DMCA concern. INPUTS: at least one of (questionId UUID, questionText, questionUrl), type (translation|factual|inappropriate|att

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "quizbase_random" is 2747 chars, far longer than this server's median (425). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Fetch N random trivia questions matching filters. Quality-first: by default excludes questions flagged for review (use quality='all' to include for audit/resear…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "quizbase_list" is 2937 chars, far longer than this server's median (425). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Cursor-paginated browse over the catalog. Quality-first: by default excludes questions flagged for review (use quality='all' for full pool). USE WHEN: full cata…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: quizbase_random, quizbase_list, quizbase_question_by_id · Private data: quizbase_random, quizbase_list, quizbase_question_by_id, quizbase_stats · Public sink: quizbase_report · Destructive: quizbase_random, quizbase_list.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: quizbase_random, quizbase_list, quizbase_question_by_id · Private data: quizbase_random, quizbase_list, quizbase_question_by_id, quizbase_stats · Public sink: quizbase_report · Destructive: quizbase_random, quizbase_list

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
